footer.tagline: One clear sentence describing what the product does.

hero.heading: The platform built for teams that ship.
hero.subheading: Stop stitching together tools. Everything your team needs in one place.

featureGrid.heading: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
featureGrid.subheading: Built for how modern teams actually work — fast, collaborative, and distributed.

features.title: Instant deployments
features.description: Push to main and ship in seconds. Zero downtime, zero config. Your pipeline, handled.

features.title: Enterprise-grade security
features.description: SOC 2 Type II, SSO, audit logs, and role-based access — security that scales with you.

features.title: 150+ integrations
features.description: Connect to the tools you already use. GitHub, Slack, Jira, Linear — all in one click.

features.title: Real-time analytics
features.description: Understand what's happening the moment it happens. Dashboards that actually answer questions.

features.title: Built for teams
features.description: Permissions, workspaces, and collaboration tools designed for teams of 2 to 2,000.

features.title: Global infrastructure
features.description: Deployed across 30+ regions. Sub-100ms response times for users wherever they are.

cta.heading: Ready to ship faster?
cta.subheading: Join 10,000+ teams already using the platform.
